flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hagerstown Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Hagerstown Community College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 (22.5% → 25.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Hagerstown Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7k → 2.9k).
